# Wavelet Response

**Summary**: The characteristic shape and amplitude of the seismic wave as it passes through an array.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-putra|Putra, 2018]] analyzed the wavelet response to determine the impact of physical errors.

## Scientific Context

- [[2018-putra|Putra, 2018]] Determining the quality of the array's filtering capability.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- A 10% single error in position or elevation caused a 13% degradation in the global minima of the response. ([[2018-putra|Putra, 2018, p. 81]])
